growth_records.medium: Anaerobic defined minimal medium (NO3- reduction medium)

up.method: ion chromatography (Dionex ICS-5000, IonPac ICE-AS6) time-course; model max uptake set from delta-concentration/time

sec.units: mM (accumulated; not reported as a rate in text)
sec.method: GC (Shimadzu GC-2014) headspace + Henry's law; R12 accumulated N2O with NO transient NO2- accumulation (non-functional NosZ)

Yxs_slope_OD600_per_mM.note: OLS slope of maximum OD600 vs substrate conc (1-10 mM); yields identical on NO3- and NO2- indicating no extra energy conserved from NO3- reduction; not converted to mass-based Yxs

growth_records.cite: Carr, Alex V et al. Emergence and disruption of cooperativity in a denitrifying microbial community. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf093. [PMC12146267]
growth_records.method: reported (measured by OD600 over time; maximum specific growth rate shown in Fig. 1F and Fig. 2A but numeric per-hour value not given in text; growth spans ~95-119 h, i.e. slow-growing)
growth_records.snippet: NO3- reduction growth studies were performed in Balch tubes (10-ml culture volume) at 30C in a defined minimal medium ... containing 20 mM sodium acetate and 10 mM sodium NO3 at pH 7.2 with a 80:20 N2-CO2 headspace. ... R12 consumed NO3-, a
growth_records.notes: R. thiooxydans FW510-R12 monoculture, anaerobic batch on 20 mM acetate + 10 mM NaNO3, 30C, pH 7.2, N2:CO2 80:20 headspace. Measured (experimental) consumption of NO3- and acetate and accumulation of N2O were quantified by ion chromatography and GC over time; numeric substrate uptake / product secretion rates (mmol/gDW/h) were computed for the ModelSEED/COBRApy GEM but the values reside in the GitHub repo (github.com/baliga-lab/3H11_R12_SynCom) and are NOT stated in the article text, so rate=null. Growth measured by OD600; max specific growth rate plotted (Fig 1F/2A) but no per-hour number in text. R12 encodes narG/nirK/norB/nosZ but nosZ is non-functional (cannot reduce N2O) -> incomplete denitrifier, hence N2O accumulation. Yield expressed only as OD600-vs-mM slope (0.033 for NO3-, 0.032 for NO2-). Full medium recipe cited from ref [10].
